skills.name: find-pub-nearby
skills.description: Find craft beer pubs and breweries near a location, with live tap-list data.

skills.name: view-venue-taps
skills.description: View the current live tap list for a specific pub or brewery, with beer freshness indicators.

skills.name: get-pintpoint
skills.description: Download and install the PINtPOINT mobile app on iOS (App Store) or Android (sideload APK).
